narrative:
Lawrence township has 5,914 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.3 percentage points.
